description_long: This induction cooker features a sleek, flat black glass-ceramic surface with four circular induction heating zones, each outlined with dotted rings and labeled for easy identification. The cooktop is rectangular and has a minimalist design, with all controls located centrally near the front edge. The control panel consists of a set of touch-sensitive buttons arranged in a compact, slightly arched layout, including power, timer, and burner selection controls. The surface is highly reflective and smooth, suggesting easy cleaning and a modern aesthetic. The brand name 'BRAND' is printed in white at the center of the front edge, providing a clear point of reference. No physical knobs or switches are present, emphasizing a fully touch-operated interface.
description: A modern, flat black induction cooker with four circular heating zones and a central touch control panel. The surface is glossy, smooth, and features minimalistic white labeling.
description_view_0: Front view showing all four induction zones, the central touch control panel, and the 'BRAND' logo clearly visible.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the flatness of the cooktop and the arrangement of the touch controls near the front edge.
description_view_2: Rear view with all four induction zones visible, but the control panel and logo are less prominent.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view, again showing the flat surface and the touch control panel's position relative to the burners.
attribute_control_panel_layout: The control panel is centrally located near the front edge, featuring a compact arrangement of touch-sensitive buttons in a slightly arched pattern. There are no physical knobs; all controls are flat touch areas, with icons and labels printed in white. The panel includes power, timer, and burner selection controls.
